name: Phace
comment:
# Making Phaces

@docs fromEthAddress, fromHexString, Error, errorToString

unions.name: Error
unions.comment: Phace generation will fail if the provided source is too short or not composed of hex characters.

values.name: errorToString
values.comment: Get an explanation from an error type.

values.name: fromEthAddress
values.comment:
Generate a phace from an Ethereum `Address`. Uses 32 chraracters, leaving 6 characters near the middle unused.

CAUTION: If you supply a malformed Eth address (maybe you were mucking about with `Eth.Utils.unsafeToAddress`?),
this will produce a plain div with an error message in it.

values.name: fromHexString
values.comment: Generate a phace from a hexadecimal `String`. Make sure to remove any "0x" from the source first.
